hero.description: I design and ship production-ready web and AI-powered applications using Next.js, React, and modern backend systems — focused on performance, clean architecture, and real-world reliability.

techStack.title: Technical Toolkit
techStack.description: Technologies I use to build scalable systems and AI-driven products

projects.title: UGC-AI — AI SaaS for Ad Creative Generation
projects.description: An AI-powered SaaS that generates UGC-style ad creatives from a product image and a person — transforming static inputs into lifestyle visuals and short-form marketing videos.
decisions: Designed a multi-step AI pipeline (image → video) instead of isolated generation, enabling real marketing workflows
Integrated multiple model providers (Gemini, OpenRouter, Replicate) to avoid vendor lock-in and optimize cost vs quality
Switched from Gemini to free-tier models due to pricing constraints, maintaining product continuity under budget limits
Handled asynchronous processing for long-running AI tasks with retry logic and failure recovery
Implemented a credit-based system aligned with compute-heavy AI operations
Designed the system to be model-agnostic, allowing future upgrades without architectural changes
Managed inconsistent AI outputs with validation and fallback handling to prevent UI breakage
Deployed backend on Render, accounting for cold-start latency in UX

projects.title: PrepAI — AI-Powered Interview Report Generator
projects.description: An AI-driven platform that analyzes job descriptions and resumes to generate structured interview reports, skill gap analysis, and personalized preparation plans.
decisions: Designed structured AI outputs instead of raw responses to improve usability and clarity
Separated AI logic into a service layer for maintainability and prompt iteration
Automated resume parsing using PDF extraction to reduce manual input friction
Stored reports as persistent entities for long-term tracking and reuse
Implemented strict validation and sanitization to prevent malformed AI outputs
Built PDF generation pipeline with real-world constraints

projects.title: Trackwise — Job Tracking, Without Chaos
projects.description: A server-first job application tracking SaaS designed around real workflows — focusing on actions, follow-ups, and clarity instead of dashboards.
decisions: Designed around actionable workflows instead of passive tracking
Used Next.js Server Actions for secure and predictable mutations
Modeled job tracking as a timeline of events
Centralized validation using shared Zod schemas
Prioritized clarity over analytics-heavy dashboards

projects.title: Config-Driven Developer Portfolio
projects.description: A minimal, data-driven developer portfolio where content is fully separated from presentation using a single JSON source of truth.
decisions: Centralized all content in a single JSON file to eliminate JSX edits
Built UI components as pure render layers for strict separation of concerns
Used GSAP minimally for meaningful interaction feedback
Implemented secure contact form with Arcjet validation and Resend email handling

sections.title: Intentional Architecture
sections.content: Every technical decision should serve a clear purpose. I favor simple, composable systems over unnecessary abstraction.

sections.title: Systems Over Demos
sections.content: I focus on building complete systems — handling edge cases, failures, and real-world constraints instead of just happy-path demos.

sections.title: Sustainable Code
sections.content: Code should be predictable and maintainable. I prioritize clarity so systems remain easy to extend over time.

sections.title: Thoughtful Interaction
sections.content: UI and motion should support understanding, not decoration. Every interaction should feel intentional.

timeline.title: Master of Computer Applications (MCA)
timeline.description: Pursuing advanced studies in computer applications with a focus on system design, scalable architectures, and AI-driven applications.

timeline.title: Independent Full-Stack & AI Developer
timeline.description: Building production-focused applications combining full-stack systems with AI pipelines, async processing, and real-world constraints.

timeline.title: Frontend Development Foundations
timeline.description: Built multiple projects to master UI architecture, state management, and responsive design.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
timeline.description: Focused on software development and practical web technologies. CGPA: 7.8 / 10.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: If you're building something meaningful and need a developer who understands systems, scalability, and AI integration — let's connect.
contact.note: Messages are read carefully. If it’s a good fit, I’ll respond.
